_note: Page request queue for the BiztechCS page-writing workflow. ONE flexible workflow handles ANY page_type (segment | service | product | landing | homepage | about | category | comparison). BiztechCS is an enterprise software development & IT consulting firm (since 2006) — see Workflow\BUSINESS.md. Orchestrator picks the next 'queued' entry by priority. Status lifecycle: queued -> in_progress -> published | failed (never left in_progress).

pages.title: BiztechCS Homepage
pages.primary_goal: Convince an out-of-India decision-maker (US/EU CTO, VP Eng, founder) that BiztechCS is the low-risk choice and get them to book a 30-min call
pages.notes: Wired into the live React app (app/src). Section blueprint mirrors REDESIGN-PLAN.md §6: Hero (outcome-led + dual CTA + trust strip) -> Logo wall + outcome proof bar -> Services (6 cards) -> Featured work (3 cases w/ metrics) -> Why Biztech/Trust (de-risk the offshore concern) -> Industries -> Process (de-risk delivery) -> Testimonials (Clutch/Google) -> Tech stack -> Resources/Blog -> Final CTA band -> FAQ -> Footer. Schema: Organization + WebSite + FAQPage. Lead with proof, not 'Global Leader'.
